examples: He was affable at one moment, choleric the next.
Mr. Brooke is an extremely affable and approachable man.
Forrest was normally mild-mannered, affable, and untalkative.
Justin Timberlake has built a career as a singer and an actor by being genuinely affable.
"It's clean, straightforward modernism, " says Scheerer of Thomas's design, which absorbs visitors with an affable hospitality.
